name: Homemade syrnyky with sour cream
description: Golden cottage cheese pancakes served warm with sour cream.
fullDescription: Tender homemade syrnyky with a delicate cheese texture, pan-fried until golden and served with sour cream. A traditional sweet breakfast with a comforting homemade feel.

name: Cappuccino
description: Espresso with steamed milk and a smooth layer of foam.
fullDescription: A balanced cappuccino built on fresh espresso, steamed milk, and fine foam. Served hot with enough body to pair naturally with breakfast or dessert.
